pkgmetadata.longdescription: llama.cpp enables LLM inference with minimal setup and state-of-the-art performance on a wide variety of hardware. Supports CPU (with SIMD variants), Vulkan, SYCL/Level Zero (Intel Arc), CUDA (NVIDIA), and ROCm/HIP (AMD) backends.

use.flag: Enable BLAS for accelerated matrix operations on CPU
Use BLIS as the BLAS backend
Use FlexiBLAS as the BLAS backend
Use Intel MKL as the BLAS backend
Use OpenBLAS as the BLAS backend
Enable OpenMP multi-core parallelism for CPU inference
Enable RPC backend for distributed multi-machine inference
Build llama-server — an OpenAI-compatible HTTP inference server
Build Intel SYCL/Level Zero GPU backend for Intel Arc GPUs. Requires Intel oneAPI DPC++ compiler (icpx) installed manually from Intel.
Build Vulkan GPU backend (cross-vendor: Intel Arc, AMD, NVIDIA)
